etymology: Thor = thunder god; Provoni = from Provence
wordplay_note: The thunder from Provence — revolutionary with a divine-sounding name
card_description: Thors Provoni (meaning "Thor = thunder god; Provoni = from Provence") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Our Friends from Frolix 8*. Revolutionary leader who journeys to Frolix 8 seeking alien allies against Earth's tyranny. Name note: The thunder from Provence — revolutionary with a divine-sounding name. The freedom fighter as spiritual quester. First appears in *Our Friends from Frolix 8*.

reference.brief: Revolutionary leader who journeys to Frolix 8 seeking alien allies against Earth's tyranny
reference.etymology: Thor = thunder god; Provoni = from Provence
reference.significance: The freedom fighter as spiritual quester
